title: GreatCombat
description: Powerful combat mode manager with cooldowns, scoreboard, preventions, powerups and a lot.
body:
**Description**
The plugin adds a "Combat Mode" system to your server, during which players have certain restrictions.

**Features**
* Scoreboard with any information about opponents
* "Actions" system for more flexible configuration (e.g., [MESSAGE] etc.)
* Flexible and functional power-up system (god, fly, etc.), allowing you to specify under what conditions PvP will not start and which power-ups will be disabled
* Powerful cooldowns system for items with different handlers, checks and using Caffeine
* Powerful system to prevent item usage during PvP
* Convenient formatting system for displayed time
* No Depencies, CMI, Essentials, PlaceholderAPI and TAB is optional.
* Support for TAB and FastBoard for scoreboard management
* Ability to start and stop battle mode using a command
* Convenient system for blocking unwanted commands during PvP and removing them from tab completion
* Basic player kill system upon leaving and kicking, ignored worlds, etc.

**Screenshots**
![start](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3da196062e191e1d6be6af0767e9c72f81f93ae5.png)
![cooldowns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/788935bdbc63836adbd76c66f84aa1d7d44b65d8.png)
